name: Beef Stroganoff
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds Beef round steak, 1/2 inch thick
2 medium onions, thinly sliced and separated into rings
2 cans (4 oz each) sliced mushrooms, drained or 1/2 lb fresh mushrooms
1/4 cup flour, hot buttered noodles or fluffy rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim all excess fat from the steak and cut meat into 3-inch strips about 1/2 inch wide.
2. In a shallow dish, combine the flour, salt, pepper, and dry mustard. Toss with steak strips to coat thoroughly.
3. Place the coated steak strips in a Crock Pot. Stir in onion rings and mushrooms.
4. Pour in the beef broth and white wine.
5. Before serving, stir together sour cream and flour in a separate bowl.
6. Add this mixture into the Crock Pot and cook until heated through.
7. Serve Stroganoff over hot buttered noodles or rice, garnished with minced parsley.
